Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS WELLS FARGO ADVISORS FINANCIAL NETWORK, LLC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to September 5, 2013 to give moving the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 28, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
